Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), relevant language skills (Target 4.4), and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7).

有興趣認識德國語言及文化

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright) by using original textbooks provides a minor link to promoting the rule of law under Target 16.3.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds capacity for international partnership (Target 17.16) by enabling communication, as seen in goals like '想交德國朋友' (make German friends) and preparing for exchange.
